Tushar Borate

Available for internships & projects

I'm a Computer Engineering student with a deep interest in building things that work — clean, fast, and purposeful. I focus on full-stack web development with the MERN stack and have explored embedded systems through IoT projects.

I treat every project as a chance to learn something new. Whether it's a web portal, a gesture-recognition device, or this portfolio — I ship real things, not just demos.

Student Achievement Wall of Fame 2024
A portal where student excellence gets the spotlight it deserves.
HTML · CSS · JS · Node.js · MySQL
  • Dynamic web portal for managing & displaying student achievements
  • Admin dashboard with CRUD operations on achievement data
  • Searchable, filterable frontend for browsing records

Gesture Recognition Device 2024
Bridging the physical and digital with your hands.
IoT · Sensors · Microcontroller · Embedded C
  • Detects hand gestures using flex/pressure sensors on a microcontroller
  • Translates gesture input into digital signals or commands
  • Hardware + firmware integration from scratch
Portfolio Website 2025
This site — with a live achievement management portal.
HTML · CSS · Vanilla JS · localStorage
  • Sidebar-panel layout inspired by minimal developer portfolios
  • Achievement portal syncs in real-time across browser tabs
  • Dark / light theme, scroll progress, smooth panel transitions
